commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can gate the lenient fallback to the intended validation error class and add focused regression coverage without choosing a new product direction.; Needs attention: The diff changes validation for untrusted MCP tool schemas and currently broadens acceptance beyond the stated typeless-inputSchema case.; Review finding: [P1] Restrict the lenient fallback to typeless input schemas — src... commands.review_summary:
The PR changes bundled MCP tool discovery to fall back to a lenient tools/list parser for typeless root inputSchema values, normalize accepted schemas, and skip explicit non-object roots.

PR surface: Source +110, Tests +124. Total +234 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main still lets a `client.listTools()` validation error escape the bundled MCP server catalog path when the SDK rejects the `tools/list` payload. The contributor also supplied before/after live stdio MCP output, but I did not run a local repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can gate the lenient fallback to the intended validation error class and add focused regression coverage without choosing a new product direction.
